commentary: Fifteen years on the morning drive and I still get a thrill when the ON AIR light comes on. Thank you Joburg.
The best conversations always happen after the mic goes down. Working on a little something to change that. More when it's ready.
Rhythm FM 94.7 turns 30 this year. Three decades of keeping Joburg company. Anniversary programming coming soon.
Proud of my friends doing brave, independent creative work this year. You know who you are.
Reminder: local radio is community infrastructure. Support your independent stations and storytellers.
